name: Greater Sacrifice
effect: Sacrifice up to 6 Max HP. Gain +1 Damage dice for a number of turns equal to the HP sacrificed. If you sacrifice at least 3 HP you instead gain +1 Damage Dice for the rest of the Battle. If you sacrifice 6 HP you also gain High Critical for the rest of the Battle.
description: A lot of pain now, for a lot of power ~~later~~ immediately.
